text:
## Datos

The out-of-sample Sharpe is {sharpe_oos:.2f}, the out-of-sample win rate is {win_rate_oos:.2%}, and the out-of-sample max drawdown is {max_drawdown_oos:.2%}. Gate summary: {gates_summary}. First failed gate: {first_failed}.

## Interpretacion

The evidence satisfies the fixed quality gates for this demo and remains bounded by the configured risk constraints.

## Recomendacion

Mark the hypothesis as a candidate for human review. Do not treat the result as authorization for trading.
